rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. Court to determine whether to instruct and order a pro rata distribution to the preferred creditors without interest. Counsel and parties may appear in person or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. Please review LRSF 14.1. For Zoom appearance: meeting ID is 160 225 4765 and password is 514879. For audio-only telephone appearance via Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878.

rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF BETTINA ANDERSON
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required, as nothing has been filed, since this petition was initially set for 07/16/2024, to address the following issues (e-mailed to counsel on 07/05/2024): 1) The address of Thomas Wright (executor) listed on the proof of service is in Finland, but according to his petition for probate and DE-147 form filed in the conservatee's probate case in San Mateo County, his address is 41 Peralta Ave, San Francisco. 2) Has the executor taken possession of all assets previously held by the petitioner as conservator of the estate? If so, a signed receipt must be filed, together with the petitioner's declaration matching a description and amount (for cash) of each asset actually or constructively delivered to the executor. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ROBERT GEORGE CASTLE
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required, although no courtesy copies of responsive papers were received by the assigned examiner by the deadline of 11/1/24 (or even as of 11/6/24). 1) The Court to determine if the incomplete investigation done very recently by Santoni Services was sufficient to locate heirs of the decedent. 2) A "correction" to a petition is an amendment, not a "supplement." Please have the CASE NUMBER and the CASE NAME ready for the clerk. Parties appearing must check in for the hearing using their FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear in person or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. Please review LRSF 14.1 D. for information on remote appearances. For Zoom appearance: meeting ID is 160 225 4765 and password is 514879. For audio-only telephone appearance via Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF CARLA JEAN CAMPODONICO
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. The following issues to be addressed/cleared: (1) Petition #8 to identify the trust beneficiaries as the petitioner/proposed executor is the trustee of the sole devisee trust. Supplement filed 9/26/2024, which still does not list the trust beneficiaries. Merely attaching a copy of the devisee trust without listing all beneficiaries seems insufficient as the trust is not before the court. (2) Petition #8 lists issues of two predeceased aunts; it is not clear whether there are other descendants of material and paternal grandparents. (3) Petition #8 lists Angela Campodonico in relation to the predeceased brother. Need to identify her relationship to the brother. (4) Petitioner to report whether the original has been located (by 11/8/24). If so, a new petition needs to be filed accordingly. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE JOAN GRAYSON REVOCABLE TRUST DATED JULY 12, 1994
rulings.Calendar Matter: Verified Petition To: 1) Contest Validity Of The Purported Restatement Due To Lack Of Capacity; 2) Contest Validity Of The Purported Restatement Due
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 1/7/25. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: (1) No proposed order has been lodged or received by the assigned examiner. [LRSF 14.7 A. and 14.59 E.] (2) No proof of service of notice has been filed. (3) Notice must also have attached to it the procedures for how to make a remote appearance by Zoom and CourtCall, as well as remote public access, as set out at https://sf.courts.ca.gov/divisions/probate-court. [LRSF 14.1 C.6.] (4) If the petitioners seek relief under Probate Code Section 859, are they seeking relief under Section 850? Notice must be served as required under Section 851. Please provide a proposed order and courtesy copies of the petition and any papers filed to address these issues to the assigned examiner by 12/24/24. (Lack of courtesy copies delayed review. The petition has not been reviewed fully yet.) Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.
